    1. Metrics(String, String, double[])

Class Metrics

java.lang.Object
io.perl.logger.impl.Metrics
Direct Known Subclasses:
PrintMetrics
public abstract sealed class Metrics extends Object permits PrintMetrics
Metrics name builder used by metric-based logger implementations.

The Metrics base class centralises naming conventions for Micrometer metrics (prefixes, unit suffixes and percentile-related metric names). It prepares arrays of metric names for both percentile values and percentile counts so concrete classes can register them easily with a meter registry.

Concrete subclasses should reuse the prepared name fields when creating counters, gauges or other metric instruments.
